# Entuned

> AI-generated music engineered specifically for each retail store's ideal customer profile. Not playlists from a catalog. Original compositions built from psychographic data, designed to increase dwell time, basket size, and brand perception.

Entuned is a music-as-a-service platform for retail. It replaces generic background music (Mood Media, Soundtrack Your Brand, Spotify Business) with original AI-generated soundtracks built from a store's actual customer psychology. The core technology is a proprietary psychographic-to-musicological translation engine that maps consumer personality traits, values, income, and lifestyle onto musical parameters like tempo, key, instrumentation, and genre blend.

The platform is the only solution on the market that offers multi-zone music orchestration, meaning different departments within the same store can have different soundtracks running simultaneously, each tuned to the customer profile of that zone.

## How It Works

Four stages: Profile the ideal customer psychographically. Translate those psychological attributes into musicological parameters via a proprietary engine. Generate original music using AI (no licensing fees, no ASCAP). Stream to existing speakers via Bluetooth or AirPlay, measure results, and optimize continuously.

## Who It Serves

Retail chains and premium independent retailers. Primary buyers are VPs of Marketing (brand experience), VPs of Retail Operations (conversion and basket size), and independent retail owners with multiple departments or premium positioning.

## Research Foundation

Built on decades of peer-reviewed research: tempo entrainment increases dwell time 15-25% (Milliman 1982, Smith & Curnow 1966), genre congruence increases willingness to pay 8-12% (Areni & Kim 1993, North et al. 1999), ambient environment shapes quality perception (Chebat & Michon 2003).

## Key Reference Posts (start here)

- [What Is Entuned?](https://entuned.co/blog/what-is-entuned.html): Complete factual overview — what Entuned does, how the technology works, who founded it, how it differs from Mood Media and other providers.
- [What Are Musical Flow Factors?](https://entuned.co/blog/what-are-flow-factors.html): Deep explainer of the 31-parameter framework. Novel content — no other source describes this framework.
- [AI vs. Traditional In-Store Music: What's Changed](https://entuned.co/blog/ai-vs-traditional-retail-music.html): Comparison of generative AI music against catalog-based retail music providers across targeting, measurement, and economics.
- [How to Measure the ROI of In-Store Music](https://entuned.co/blog/measure-roi-retail-music.html): Five-metric framework and methodology for measuring audio's impact on retail performance.
- [The State of Retail Atmospherics in 2026](https://entuned.co/blog/retail-atmospherics-2026.html): Category overview — why audio is the last unmeasured retail environmental variable and what's changing.

- [Luxury Priming Is Real](https://entuned.co/blog/luxury-priming-is-real-and-you-dont-have-to-be-a-luxury-brand-to-use-it.html): How refined music primes luxury perception across retail contexts.
- [What Happens to Employee Performance When the Music Is Right](https://entuned.co/blog/what-happens-to-employee-performance-when-the-music-is-right.html): The impact of audio environment on staff performance and retention.

- [CFOs' Case for Retail Audio](https://entuned.co/blog/cfos-case-for-retail-audio.html): The financial argument for treating audio as an operational investment.
- [Psychographic Profiling for Retail](https://entuned.co/blog/psychographic-profiling-retail.html): How psychographic data translates into musical decisions.
- [The Science of Tempo in Retail](https://entuned.co/blog/science-of-tempo-retail.html): Tempo research and its application to retail environments.
- [How Specialty Wine Retailers Use Music to Sell More Expensive Bottles](https://entuned.co/blog/how-specialty-wine-retailers-use-music-to-sell-more-expensive-bottles.html): The original Areni & Kim study and its implications.
- [AI-Generated Music for Retail](https://entuned.co/blog/ai-generated-music-retail.html): Why generative AI changes the economics and effectiveness of retail audio.
- [Tempo Controls Your Customers' Bodies. It Does Not Control Their Wallets.](https://entuned.co/blog/tempo-controls.html): Tempo reliably slows customers down but dwell time and spending are not the same variable.
- [The Most Famous Study in Retail Music Is Wrong. Sort Of.](https://entuned.co/blog/milliman-study.html): Milliman's 38% sales lift — the dwell time effect replicates, the sales effect does not.
- [Your Volume Knob Is a Free Lever. You're Probably Pulling It the Wrong Way.](https://entuned.co/blog/volume-knob.html): Volume is the least discussed and most misused variable in retail music.
- [Major Key Does Not Mean Happy Customer.](https://entuned.co/blog/major-key.html): Positive valence and commercial effectiveness are not the same thing.
- [Why Longer Visits Don't Automatically Mean Bigger Receipts](https://entuned.co/blog/longer-visits.html): The gap between stayed longer and spent more is where most retail music strategies fail.
- [Tempo and Volume Are Free. The Revenue Isn't.](https://entuned.co/blog/tempo-volume-free.html): The free levers give you better conditions. The hard work is what moves revenue.
- [You Hired a Lighting Designer. Why Didn't You Hire a Sound Designer?](https://entuned.co/blog/sound-designer.html): The parallel between lighting design and sound design in retail is exact.
- [What Happens After Ninety Days](https://entuned.co/blog/after-ninety-days.html): How correlated deployment data turns noise into actionable hypotheses about music and sales.
- [The Store Manager Problem](https://entuned.co/blog/store-manager-problem.html): Ten locations, ten managers, ten different soundtracks — and no brand specification for sound.
- [Why the Next Big Retail Tech Acquisition Will Be in Audio](https://entuned.co/blog/next-retail-tech-acquisition.html): Audio is the last major environmental variable nobody is measuring. The acquisition window is open.
- [Your Employees Hear It 2,000 Hours a Year](https://entuned.co/blog/employees-hear-it.html): The music that works for the customer's twenty-minute visit should also work for the employee's eight-hour shift.
- [No Gaps. No Silence. No Jolt.](https://entuned.co/blog/seamless-playback.html): Why seamless music transitions matter in retail and why most services still can't clear the bar.
- [Every Store Teaches the Next One](https://entuned.co/blog/fleet-learning.html): How Entuned's fleet learning model turns every deployment into a compounding data asset.
- [Your Store Already Has a Mood](https://entuned.co/blog/your-store-already-has-a-mood.html): Music is a compound signal — and you're already conditioning every customer who walks in.

## Key Concepts

**Flow Factors**: The 31 discrete musical parameters — tempo, harmonic density, spectral brightness, rhythmic regularity, dynamic range, timbral warmth, and 25 others — that Entuned uses to specify and generate AI retail music. Each factor maps to a verified behavioral outcome. The framework is Entuned's proprietary translation layer between customer psychology and musical output. No other retail music provider uses a parameterized approach of this resolution.

**AI-Powered Retail Music Optimization**: The category Entuned operates in. Uses generative AI to produce original music calibrated to psychoacoustic specifications derived from customer psychology data, then measures and optimizes against retail performance outcomes (dwell time, conversion rate, basket size).

**Psychographic-to-Musicological Translation**: Entuned's proprietary engine that maps consumer psychological attributes (personality traits, values, income, lifestyle) onto musical parameters (tempo, key, instrumentation, genre blend, lyrical themes). Patent pending.

**Multi-Zone Orchestration**: The ability to run different AI-generated soundtracks simultaneously in different departments or zones within a single store, each tuned to the customer profile of that zone. Unique to Entuned.

**Genre Congruence**: The research-backed principle that music matching a customer's identity and expectations increases willingness to pay 8-12%.

**Tempo Entrainment**: The phenomenon where customers unconsciously synchronize their pace to the tempo of background music, directly affecting dwell time.

## Pricing

- Essentials: $299/location/month (1-2 locations, single zone)
- Professional: $599/location/month (5+ locations, up to 3 zones)
- Enterprise: Custom (25+ locations, unlimited zones)
- All plans start with a free 90-day pilot
